[General Notes for Act 6]
• Since the resistance is 30%, I need to re-verify that sufficient resistance is actually achieved and make any necessary adjustments.
(Continuing to aim for a resistance level as close to 75% as possible)
- Specifically, for the boss in Act 6, I want to prioritize increasing resistance to cold, as that is a key vulnerability.
- Using Crafting Bench allows you to quickly add resistance, which is very convenient.
―Alternatively, you could purchase and use "Purity of Element" directly, starting with "Lilly".
• In Act 6 and beyond, you may encounter areas that are similar to those you cleared in Act 1-5, but the layout is generally the same.
